level1: LED Landscape Lighting /// LED Deck and Step Lights

hits.description:
The 12V Black Recessed Eyelid LED Step / Deck Light provides functional accent lighting along steps, patios, and decks. The hooded design distributes 150° of light at a downward angle, increasing visibility and safety along pathways and steps. Constructed of aluminum with a black powder-coated finish, each eyelid light is corrosion-resistant and withstands impact from possible foot traffic. The light recess mounts into a 5/8" round hole, ensuring a low-profile design that protects the light from moisture.

Product Details:

  • Black powder-coated aluminum housing
  • IP65 waterproof
  • Installs in a 5/8" round hole
  • 22 AWG pigtail wire connection
  • Also available in an RGB option

hits.name: Round LED Truck and Trailer Lights - 4" Stop / Turn / Tail Lights - 3-Pin Connector - Recessed Mount - 12 LEDs
hits.features_description:
Features

  • Industry-standard 3-pin socket
  • DOT, SAE, CE, and RoHS compliant
  • IP65 weatherproof rated sealed construction
  • 3-pin plugs, grommet, and mounting bracket (sold separately)
  • Lifetime warranty
View more details
hits.description:
This 4" round 12 LED light meets DOT FMVSS 108 requirements for vehicle signal lighting such as a tail light, turn light, hazard light, stop light, reverse, or backup light. The light has a sonically sealed polycarbonate lens and weatherproof housing for harsh outdoor conditions. Recess mounts easily with a separate grommet or flange and 3-pin connector to provide stop, turn, or tail lights on vehicles (see accessories). Amber and red are Tail, Stop and Turn with GRND. White is Stop and Turn only with GRND.

Product Details:

  • Sealed polycarbonate
  • IP65 rated
  • Available in amber, red, or white
  • 3-pin plug socket
  • 9 - 14.8 VDC range
  • CE, DOT, SAE, and RoHS compliant
  • Lifetime Warranty

hits.description:
This 6-inch 10-LED truck and trailer light meets DOT, SAE, and CE requirements. Use red for stop, turn, and tail lights, amber for turn, hazard, and parking, and white for back-up light.  Each light has a sealed polycarbonate construction that withstands harsh outdoor conditions. Accepts industry-standard 3-pin plugs and installs with a separate grommet or mounting bracket and 3-pin connector to provide stop, turn, or tail lights on vehicles (see accessories).

Product Details:

  • Sealed polycarbonate
  • IP65 Rated
  • 3-pin plug socket
  • 9 - 14.8 VDC range
  • DOT, SAE, CE, and RoHS Compliant
  • Lifetime Warranty

hits.description:
Recessed LED Puck Lights are a stylish and sleek option ideal for accent lighting, display cases, under-cabinets, and more. Available in cool, natural, or warm white. Flanges available in chrome, brushed nickel, or a polished brass finish. The 0.9 inch deep lights mount into a 2.5 inch diameter recess. Connect to power with the 8.5 inch pigtail wire. 

Note: Wiring is non-polarized and either can be connected to positive/negative power wire.

Product Details:
  • Clear lens
  • 120° beam angle
  • 8.5" pigtail wire
  • 12 VAC, 12-48 VDC input

hits.description:

Pair the RGB step light with a compatible controller (sold separately) to create a customized dynamic light display. The hooded design distributes 150° of light at a downward angle, increasing visibility and safety along pathways and steps. Constructed of aluminum with a black powder-coating, each eyelid light is corrosion-resistant and withstands impact from possible foot traffic. The light recess mounts into a 5/8" round hole, ensuring a low-profile design that protects the light from moisture.

Product Details:

  • Black powder-coated aluminum housing
  • IP65 waterproof
  • Installs in a 5/8" round hole
  • 22 AWG pigtail wire connection
  • Also available in a single CCT option
